programme.title: The Frozen Ghost
programme.desc: Rebellious teen Amy (Elizabeth Berridge) defies her parents by going to a trashy carnival that has pulled into town. In tow are her boyfriend, Buzz (Cooper Huckabee), and their friends Liz (Largo Woodruff) and Richie (Miles Chapin). Thinking it would be fun to spend the night in the campy Funhouse horror ride, the teens witness a murder by a deformed worker wearing a mask. Locked in, Amy and her friends must evade the murderous carnival workers and escape before it leaves town the next day.

Locked in, Amy and her friends must evade the murderous carnival workers and escape before it leaves town the next day.

When Detective Kanon's daughter is murdered in London, he learns of similar murders happening across Europe - each preceded by a postcard sent to a local journalist - and fights to stop the killings and find justice for his little girl.

programme.title: The Ultimate Object of Admiration
programme.desc: Laval and Li’Ella’s relationship grows as he gives her a tour of the Lion City. But distracted, he misses a key battle against the Hunters. Tormak joins the fight and saves the day. But the Lion King Lagravis is captured and brought to the Ice Fort. Who will lead the Lions now?!?

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake's friends watch her with wide eyes as she everrrrr-so-gently squirts a layer of blueberry smoothie into a tall glass, trying to not disturb the five other multi-colored layers beneath it. It's her tenth attempt to create the world's first Rainbow Smoothie! She has even painted one wall of her café rainbow colors in honor of the soon-to-be new item on the menu. No one dares breathe for fear of spoiling the delicate touch of a master smoothie-squirter at work.

It's her tenth attempt to create the world's first Rainbow Smoothie! She has even painted one wall of her café rainbow colors in honor of the soon-to-be new item on the menu. No one dares breathe for fear of spoiling the delicate touch of a master smoothie-squirter at work.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends
programme.desc: Meet the WellieWishers™ - a sweet and lively group of friends who play in their whimsical garden. While the girls play, they learn about the natural world and experience the magic of their imaginations. Their sometimes silly, sometimes serious adventures allow them to explore the wonders of their garden - where all living things thrive and grow, along with creativity, friendship, and kindness.

programme.title: Los Pitufos
programme.desc: Gargamel lanza un hechizo a la nueva cama de Papá Pitufo para que cualquiera que duerma en ella sea transportado al lugar con el que esté soñando. Los ensueños de los Pitufos les llevan a un barco, un castillo y, por último, hasta Gargamel. Consiguen escapar cuando Pitufo Torpe se queda dormido y sueña con su hogar.

Los ensueños de los Pitufos les llevan a un barco, un castillo y, por último, hasta Gargamel. Consiguen escapar cuando Pitufo Torpe se queda dormido y sueña con su hogar.

Los ensueños de los Pitufos les llevan a un barco, un castillo y, por último, hasta Gargamel. Consiguen escapar cuando Pitufo Torpe se queda dormido y sueña con su hogar.

programme.title: AnimaCars
programme.desc: Winx Club is a fantasy saga revolving around six fairies and their adventures. The protagonists Bloom, Stella, Flora, Aisha, Tecna and Musa live their daily life on Magix world, among lessons, loves, quarrels and moments of strong friendship. At any moment, when needed, they can transform into super-heroines, ready to defeat evil and save who is in danger.

At any moment, when needed, they can transform into super-heroines, ready to defeat evil and save who is in danger.

programme.desc: On the way to Luxor, Joseph notices an electrical outlet set in a rock. Fascinated by the rare sight, Joseph goes in for a closer look and gets shocked. Though he seems fine afterwards, soon all manner of small accidents begin to occur around him.

programme.title: Sonic X -EP37 Robotnik's Revenge
programme.desc: Oga gets tired of volleyball practice and stumbles upon Miki practicing his special move in a dojo. Miki and Oga decided to "spar" with each other, and Miki asks Oga why he betrayed him in the past... Finally, the truth behind Miki's thirst for beating Oga will be revealed!
